description.ko: 보이드-3 탐사선이 우주의 고요한 심장부로 들어가, 심연의 우주가 가진 압도적인 아름다움과 거대한 규모를 마주하는 여정입니다.
description.en: A journey into the silent heart of the universe where the VOID-3 vessel encounters the overwhelming beauty and terrifying scale of the deep cosmos.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the VOID-3 explorer ship navigating a surreal cosmic abyss, glowing event horizon of a supermassive black hole in the background, intricate nebulae patterns in deep indigo and violet, stardust particles floating in the foreground, hyper-realistic textures, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, sci-fi concept art.
